retrieved_result: Estimated Cost of Attendance, 2014-2015 \"This page contains estimates of the Cost of Attendance for one year at the University of Virginia, including Tuition and Fees, Room, Board, Personal Expenses and Travel. Each year Student Financial Services establishes standard estimates to help families determine their financial needs for the year\"
Decision_Reason: The page discusses university cost of attendance, not easy DIY room decoration ideas.
